} return $this->_factors; } /** * Access the newFactors */ protected function getNewFactors(): NewFactorList { if (!$this->_newFactors) { $this->_newFactors = new NewFactorList( $this->version, $this->solution['serviceSid'], $this->solution['identity'] );
